arguments.code:
def sum_difference(n):
    sum_n = n * (n + 1) // 2
    sum_sq = n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) // 6
    return sum_sq - sum_n

# Test cases
assert sum_difference(12) == 5434
assert sum_difference(20) == 41230
assert sum_difference(54) == 2151270

arguments.code:
def sum_difference(n):
    sum_n = n * (n + 1) // 2
    sum_sq = n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) // 6
    return (sum_n**2) - sum_sq

# Test cases
assert sum_difference(12) == 5434
assert sum_difference(20) == 41230
assert sum_difference(54) == 2151270

arguments.answer:
The function to calculate the difference is: def sum_difference(n):
    sum_n = n * (n + 1) // 2
    sum_sq = n * (n + 1) * (2 * n + 1) // 6
    return sum_sq - sum_n

# Test cases
assert sum_difference(12) == 5434
assert sum_difference(20) == 41230
assert sum_difference(54) == 2151270
